text: If populists who reach power tend to moderate (Pavel) but social-media dynamics destroy shared facts and compromise (Weber), is institutional containment-via-governing-responsibility still a viable theory of democratic resilience?
context: Tension between Pavel's reassurance about populists in power and Weber's diagnosis of an information environment that punishes compromise; never directly engaged.

grounded_formulations.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
